caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt sits in a room filled with framed pictures and clothing racks. His shirt features the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WRK". He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone. In the background, a white mannequin is visible alongside various articles of clothing hanging on racks. Red and white logos appear in the lower corners of the scene, including one that reads "BREEZY". Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated and faces slightly to the left, with a steady expression. His head moves slightly, and his lips move as if he is speaking, while the rest of the setting remains static.
